ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media asset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the asset */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset type (e.g., image, video) */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the asset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full file path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* File path to the thumbnail of the asset */,
  "params" TEXT /* Additional parameters for the asset (e.g., theme, video settings) */,
  "create_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was created */,
  "deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the asset has been deleted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the asset (e.g., active, pending review, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "default_params" TEXT /* Default parameters for the asset type */,
  "max_file_size" REAL /* Maximum file size allowed for this asset type in MB */,
  "thumbnail_required" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if a thumbnail is required for this asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thumbnails" (
  "thumbnail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thumbnail */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the thumbnail belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the thumbnail */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the thumbnail file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the thumbnail (e.g., jpg, png) */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the thumbnail (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the thumbnail was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thumbnail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thumbnails_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_params" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_key" TEXT /* Key of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_params_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., content type, theme) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tags" (
  "asset_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset-tag association */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tags_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_file" TEXT /* File path to the version file */,
  "version_params" TEXT /* Additional parameters for the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the asset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., create, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions_json" TEXT /* JSON format of the permissions for better flexibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being shared */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the asset */,
  "shared_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the asset */,
  "share_message" TEXT /* Message sent along with the share */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the asset was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_shares_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_shares_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_shares_shared_to FOREIGN KEY ("shared_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the asset */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "rating_status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_ratings_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used */,
  "search_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search was performed */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the integration */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the integration is enabled */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL for the integration */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync with the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
